data.title: If You Invested $1000 In Waste Management Stock 5 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
data.description:
Waste Management (NYSE:WM) has outperformed the market over the past 5 years by 4.21% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 16.32%. Currently, Waste Management has a market capitalization of $94.40 billion.

Buying $1000 In WM: If an investor had bought $1000 of WM stock 5 years ago, it would be worth $2,117.04 today based on a price of $234.06 for WM at the time of writing.

Waste Management's Performance Over Last 5 Years

Finally -- what's the point of all this? The key insight to take from this article is to note how much of a difference compounded returns can make in your cash growth over a period of time.
